updates.title: Tech Section Synced
updates.summary: The first shared ChatGPT conversation was converted into Career Deck database records and published with manual review preserved for uncertain fields.
items: Imported Claude Corps, Apple undergraduate internships, Microsoft student programs, MLH programs, AI hackathons, and company career role links.
Marked unknown deadlines, compensation, eligibility, and role titles as Manual review instead of fabricating fields.
Flagged BeBee and Jobright as aggregator-only records pending official employer verification.
Kept LinkedIn and X as blocked sources because login, platform restrictions, and anti-bot protections prevent compliant scraping.

updates.title: Game Section Synced
updates.summary: The game-industry shared ChatGPT conversation was synced into a separate Game section with studio career pages, internships, co-ops, early-career programs, and aggregator-only leads marked for review.
items: Added game-studio sources including Riot Games, Activision, Blizzard, Epic Games, EA, Ubisoft, PlayStation, 2K, King, Zynga, Scopely, Tencent, Garena, Paper Games, InFold Games, NetEase, Kabam, and Razer.
Separated official studio career pages from aggregator links such as GameJobs, BuiltIn, LinkedIn, BeBee, ZipRecruiter, and ShowbizJobs.

Preserved role titles that were visible in the shared conversation URL paths, but kept deadlines, compensation, eligibility, and locations as Manual review unless the chat source clearly exposed them.
Kept every game record review-required until a future source adapter can fetch, parse, normalize, validate, and save the official page directly.
